# Introduction

Replace this with the first chapter of your book.

Citations work the same as in any quartobot project. Reference the
foundational manubot paper [@doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128]; cite
Quarto [@quarto2024] when the publishing stack is the point. Mix
persistent-identifier cites with hand-curated entries from
`references.bib` as the prose needs.

Each chapter renders to its own HTML page in `_book/`. Quarto attaches
the resolved bibliography to the bottom of each chapter — the references
appear next to the prose that uses them, which is the typical book
reading pattern.
